neet-MOCK-1.subject: Physics
neet-MOCK-1.text: A particle moves along a straight line with a velocity v = (3t² + 2t) m/s. What is the displacement of the particle between t = 1s and t = 2s?
neet-MOCK-1.explanation: Displacement Δx = ∫v dt from 1 to 2. ∫(3t² + 2t)dt = [t³ + t²] from 1 to 2. Upper limit: (8+4)=12. Lower limit: (1+1)=2. Result: 12-2 = 10m.

neet-MOCK-1.subject: Botany
neet-MOCK-1.text: Which of the following is known as the 'Powerhouse of the cell'?
neet-MOCK-1.explanation: Mitochondria are responsible for producing ATP through cellular respiration, hence called the powerhouses of the cell.
